analysis.reasoning: Core message: Quoting a former Chinese ambassador saying China and Africa are natural friends who treat each other as equals, and that only international solidarity and cooperation can defeat COVID-19. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile): Not referenced; no criticism of the West. CH2 (China is a benevolent power): Yes—emphasizes equality with Africa, friendship, solidarity, and global cooperation against COVID-19, aligning with China's cooperative, multilateral image. CH3 (epic history): Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically): Not addressed; focus is international role, not domestic system. CH5 (CCP governance success): No claims about domestic achievements or leadership success. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2 only.
